heading: Appropriations for universities
label: 4517 Appropriations for universities
text: There is hereby appropriated to each recipient University named above or to the trustee of the fund designated by the President of the University the sum of $800,000 to carry out the provisions of , to be available on , and to remain available until expended.section 4516 of this titleNovember 1, 1987
notes: Codificationis a corrected version of .Pub. L. 99–591Pub. L. 99–500
